embeds.title: Morimens : The Holy Spreadsheet by Flares.
embeds.description: Over the weekend, with the help of some friends and AI I made a song dedicated to all of my guide followers who used the Holy Spreadsheet. Maybe I'll make a BTS vid. But I used the voice of Tori White who sings at the Sacred Heart Catholic Church and Our Holy Redeemer for the female vocals and editi
